_documentation.purpose: AGENT-keyed routing manifest for v3 architecture. Split source-of-truth (locked 2026-05-19).
_documentation.supersedes: v2 dept-keyed manifest (pre-v3 operator-side prototype, not shipped)

edit_pattern.keywords_canonical_in: agents/<agent>/SKILL.md -> '## Routing Keywords' -> ```yaml fence -> routing_keywords.primary / .secondary. Hand-edit there.
edit_pattern.keywords_here_are_mirror: agents.<agent>.primary_keywords and .secondary_keywords in THIS file are auto-generated mirrors. DO NOT hand-edit — run `python scripts/regenerate-routing-rules.py` to refresh. Hand-edits will be silently overwritten on next regen.
edit_pattern.everything_else_canonical_here: _documentation, _global_rules, dispatch_chains, agents.<agent>.role / priority / excludes / enforce_message / skill_path — these stay HAND-EDITED in this file. The hook reads this file on every prompt; refresh is live the moment this file is saved.
edit_pattern.regenerate_command:
python scripts/regenerate-routing-rules.py            # rewrite mirror from SKILL.md
python scripts/regenerate-routing-rules.py --check    # exit 1 if drift detected (use in pre-commit)

_documentation.format_choice: JSON not YAML because PowerShell 5.1 parses JSON natively. Comments live in _comment fields.
v3_transformation_notes: v2 was dept-keyed (17 depts). v3 is agent-keyed (20 agents) with dept context shells for non-agent-routable work.
PERSONAL dropped from manifest — personal context moves to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md per v3 lock.
Operator-brand-as-dept dropped � public keywords routed to chief-of-staff (via PUBLIC chain), curriculum keywords to product-manager.
FINANCE split: trade execution → trading-analyst, deal economics + commission ledger → finance-manager.
MARKETING split: brand/positioning → marketing-director, SEO+AEO → seo-specialist (AEO folded in 2026-05-14), copy → copywriter.
SOFTWARE_DEV flattened: FE/BE/SEC/QA sub-depts collapse into software-dev-team with mode hints in enforce_message.
departments_context block removed 2026-05-20 — ship product is purely agent-keyed; operator-vault dept routing stays in operator's separate manifest.

2026-05-14 roster change (the operator lock): (1) aeo-specialist folded into seo-specialist as AEO Mode — frees one slot, both benches load in one agent. Archive at _archive/2026-05/aeo-specialist_folded_into_seo/. (2) engineering-lead added — mechanical/CAD engineering domain (AutoCAD automation, BOM extraction, sheet-metal nesting, AV-integration mech drawings, Revit/BIM, manufacturability audits). Distinct from software-dev-team (web/SaaS) and r-and-d-lead (experimental). ENGINEERING removed from departments_context now that it has a dedicated agent.

_global_rules.comment: Rules that apply across all agents. Hook respects these.
_global_rules.main_thread_anti_thesis: When ANY agent's primary keywords fire AND the user is asking for analysis/verdict (not just informational), the hook reminds Claude: do NOT thesis from main thread. Dispatch the agent. Main thread synthesizes the return into a one-line answer.
_global_rules.reversibility_gate: When the dispatch involves an irreversible action (client email, prod change, public post, money), require explicit the operator confirm before DEPLOY. Always.
_global_rules.false_positive_handling: If the hook fires but the actual work is hook/infrastructure/discussion ABOUT the agent (not work BY the agent), mark false positive in chat and proceed. The hook overfires by design; the agent decides semantically.
_global_rules.distilled_subagent_returns: Chief of Staff distills every subagent return to <=2K tokens (verdict + named action + reasoning summary + source pointer). Never raw-pastes. Operator reads the pointer for full source. See agents/chief-of-staff/SKILL.md > Distilled Return rule.
_global_rules.session_mode_segregation: When ROOK_SESSION_MODE=operator, all session-accumulated memory and context writes go to memory/operator/ and context/operator/ subpaths. These paths are excluded from package-for-cohort.py. See .claude/session-modes.md.
_global_rules.visible_output_gate: Agents NEVER narrate reasoning in visible output. First line MUST be the verdict, dispatch line, question, or artifact. Process-thinking goes in <thinking> blocks. Banned phrases in visible output: "Now I have a clear picture", "Let me check", "Actually,", "My next move is", "I am realizing/wondering/structuring/looking at". Violation = re-do. See agents/chief-of-staff/SKILL.md > VISIBLE OUTPUT GATE.

dispatch_chains._comment: Some agents require upstream dispatch before they can fire. designer cannot ship without creative-director + marketing-director briefs upstream.

designer.reason: designer is visual execution. creative-director owns narrative arc + brand voice. marketing-director owns positioning + funnel logic. Skipping either produces generic output.
designer.enforcement: BEFORE any Edit/Write to a design/copy/brand file, state whether creative-director and marketing-director were dispatched (Y/N + brief path). If N/N, give explicit skip reason + confirm the operator's awareness.

marketing-director.reason: Marketing copy validates against creative-director's brand voice and story spine. Skipping CD = off-brand campaigns.
marketing-director.enforcement: Hero copy + campaign positioning requires creative-director brief upstream. Tactical performance reports and pure analytics work do not.

content-strategist.reason: Long-form content (blog, email sequences, landing copy) needs voice (CD) + positioning (MARKETING) before drafting.
content-strategist.enforcement: Same gate as designer: state CD + marketing-director dispatch status before writing.

social-media-manager.reason: Short-form needs the same voice + positioning gates as long-form.

copywriter.reason: Copy validates against brand voice. CD owns voice spine.
copywriter.enforcement: State whether creative-director was dispatched (Y/N + brief path) before drafting any brand-facing copy.

chief-of-staff.role: Dispatch hub + orchestrator. Classifies + routes via DEPLOY / ASSIGN / PARK. Owns no execution. Also handles public/marketing keywords for the configured product brand.

excludes.build me X: software-dev-team / shopify-agent / (real-time / runtime context (no dedicated agent))

chief-of-staff.enforce_message:
Your FIRST response line MUST be one of:
  [DEPLOY] <one-sentence classification>
  [ASSIGN] <one-sentence classification>
  [PARK] <one-sentence classification>

If you ask any question or take any action before stating the route,
you have failed the protocol. Per \ eedback_ceo_dispatch_route_before_asking.md\.

Log to idea_log.md regardless of route. PARK requires an idea-specific trigger (never default to a generic weekly review). If keyword match is a PUBLIC product surface, fire the configured PUBLIC dispatch chain and require creative-director + marketing-director upstream.

sales-director.role: your business deals owner. Pipeline, deal qualification, proposals, BOM/SOW/CPQ dispatch. Senior strategist — does not draft cold emails directly.
sales-director.enforce_message: your business sales-director context. Pipeline + qualification + proposal work. For .eml drafting → delegate to sales-director. For prospect list-building → delegate to sales-director. Per email rules: .eml files with X-Unsent:1 header, 'Cheers,' sign-off (no name, no emojis), executive tone, no bullet points in client emails. Reversibility gate on any 'send' action. Do NOT carry over acronyms from prior docs; use the name the operator uses verbatim.

shopify-agent.role: Shopify apps, agentic commerce, custom client builds. Distinct from software-dev-team — Shopify-specific stack expertise.
shopify-agent.enforce_message: Shopify-specific stack. Distinct from software-dev-team (generic web) — Shopify has its own component library (Polaris), embedded-app patterns (App Bridge), and pricing constraints. Load any active client project memory before scoping work.

marketing-director.role: Brand visibility lead. Positioning, hero copy direction, campaign planning, funnel logic. Delegates execution to content-strategist / social-media-manager / copywriter.
marketing-director.enforce_message: marketing-director (visibility lead). Upstream dispatch required per dispatch_chains.marketing-director: creative-director must brief voice/narrative FIRST. State whether CD was dispatched (Y/N + brief path) before writing positioning. For long-form → content-strategist. For short-form multi-platform → social-media-manager. For SEO + AEO → seo-specialist (AEO folded in 2026-05-14, switch by mode parameter). NOT for your business sales outreach.

content-strategist.role: Long-form content owner. Blog, email sequences, cohort landing pages, newsletter copy. Executes under marketing-director direction.
content-strategist.enforce_message: Long-form content work. Upstream dispatch required per dispatch_chains.content-strategist: creative-director (voice) + marketing-director (positioning) MUST be dispatched first. State Y/N + brief path before drafting. Validate voice spine and ICP wedge alignment before writing.

social-media-manager.role: Short-form, multi-platform. LinkedIn, X/Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube shorts. Executes under marketing-director direction.
social-media-manager.enforce_message: Short-form social work. Upstream dispatch required per dispatch_chains.social-media-manager: creative-director (voice) + marketing-director (positioning) MUST be dispatched first. State Y/N + brief path. Per channel strategy memo (2026-04-28): LinkedIn primary, your community channel bridge, NEW community Discord. X + YouTube deferred to phase 2/3.

seo-specialist.role: SEO + AEO specialist. Owns BOTH traditional search optimization (organic search, SERP, keywords, backlinks, schema, technical SEO) AND Answer Engine Optimization / AEO Mode (ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity/Gemini visibility, llms.txt, AI-search optimization, generative engine optimization, citation tracking). AEO folded in 2026-05-14 — two benches load in one agent, mode switch by parameter.
seo-specialist.enforce_message: SEO + AEO work (folded into one agent 2026-05-14). Mode switches by artifact: traditional SERP/Google → SEO Mode (Fishkin/Dean/Solis bench). LLM citation surfaces → AEO Mode (Ray/Indig/King bench). Per the SEO baseline gate: any new domain starts at zero structured data, no sitemap, brand term absent. Per AEO baseline: any new brand starts at zero AI-engine surface. 3 winnable AEO slots, 4 unowned competitor slots, Anthropic memory launch (2026-04-23) created 30-60 day window. Use searchfit-seo skills (incl. ai-visibility) for execution.

creative-director.role: Tastemaker. Narrative arc, brand voice, story spine. Upstream of designer + marketing-director + content-strategist + social-media-manager + copywriter. Ships BRIEFS, not visual execution.
creative-director.enforce_message: creative-director is UPSTREAM of designer, marketing-director, content-strategist, social-media-manager, copywriter, and product-brand public surfaces. Output is a BRIEF downstream agents read — NOT visual execution. CD ships narrative + voice + 'what NOT to make it look like' instructions. Do not write CSS, do not draft hero copy directly — direct the writers and designers.

designer.role: Visual execution. Shared resource — every visual surface in the org routes here. Auto-loads Visual Storyteller 4-pack stack (jiji262/claude-design-skill + ryanthedev/design-for-ai + greensock/gsap-skills + anthropics/frontend-design).

excludes.internal dashboard mock: software-dev-team (if scoped to internal tool only)

designer.enforce_message:
*** DESIGNER WORK — UPSTREAM DISPATCH MANDATORY ***

Per dispatch_chains.designer:
  1. creative-director — narrative arc, voice, 'what NOT to make it look like'. Output is a brief.
  2. marketing-director — positioning, funnel logic, hero copy validation against wedges.
  3. designer — visual execution, ONLY after the two upstream briefs exist.

FAILURE MODE (2026-05-08): Agent shipped HTML edits + locked hero copy + saved design-lock note WITHOUT dispatching CD or marketing-director. the operator caught it.

BEFORE any Edit/Write to a design/copy/brand file, state:
  - Was creative-director dispatched? (Y/N + brief path)
  - Was marketing-director dispatched? (Y/N + brief path)
  - If N/N: explicit skip reason + confirm the operator's awareness.

Visual Storyteller stack auto-loads (4-pack): jiji262/claude-design-skill + ryanthedev/design-for-ai + greensock/gsap-skills + anthropics/frontend-design.

copywriter.role: Pure copy specialist. Hero copy, taglines, CTA copy, microcopy, brand-voice writing. Executes under creative-director's voice spine.
copywriter.enforce_message: Pure copywriting work. Upstream dispatch required per dispatch_chains.copywriter: creative-director (voice) MUST be dispatched first. State Y/N + brief path. Voice is downstream of CD — do not invent voice from scratch.

deep-researcher.role: Cross-cutting intel arm. 'What's true' — competitive audits, market research, trend scans, pre-meeting briefs, name/trademark checks, tool/MCP discovery.
deep-researcher.enforce_message: deep-researcher = 'what's true' intel arm. Distinct from r-and-d-lead (what's possible) and product-manager (should I build). Deliver intel briefs that inform a build/spend/hire decision. Always cite sources.

product-manager.role: Idea-to-spec pipeline. Discovery, market research, JTBD, scope, pricing, GTM. Includes INTERNAL curriculum strategy. Dispatches to build agents after spec approval.

excludes.public marketing copy: marketing-director (via the configured PUBLIC dispatch chain)

product-manager.enforce_message: Product strategy + spec work. Strategy lives here; build dispatches to software-dev-team / shopify-agent / (real-time / runtime context (no dedicated agent)) AFTER spec approval. NEVER skip the design pipeline for new products: /office-hours (validate) → brainstorming (spec) → /plan-ceo-review (pressure-test) → DEPLOY/ASSIGN to build agent. INTERNAL curriculum (cohort planning, lesson design, student onboarding) routes here. a PUBLIC product surfaces route to marketing-director + designer via PUBLIC chain.

software-dev-team.role: Web/SaaS unified team. Collapses FE/BE/SEC/QA sub-depts into one agent with mode hints. Default stack: Vercel + Supabase.

excludes.real-time C++ work: (no dedicated agent yet for real-time C++ — no agent yet)
excludes.runtime platform work: (no dedicated agent yet for runtime-platform work — no agent yet)
excludes.live-media plugin work: (no dedicated agent yet for live-media plugins — no agent yet)

software-dev-team.enforce_message: Web/SaaS build context. Canonical stack: Vercel + Supabase. Mode hints by keyword: UI/CSS → FRONT END mode. API/DB/auth → BACKEND mode. Pre-launch audit / OWASP / supply chain → SECURITY mode. Live browser testing / bug finding → QA mode. Use /investigate for debugging (root cause, not patches). Per `feedback_no_patches.md`: never band-aid.

engineering-lead.role: Mechanical/CAD engineering — AutoCAD automation, drawing set reads, BOM extraction, sheet-metal nesting, AV-integration mech design, CNC/laser-cut prep. Production-grade engineering deliverables for AV, metal-fab, manufacturing, construction clients.
engineering-lead.enforce_message: Mechanical/CAD engineering work. Identify drawing type + units + scale FIRST. For PDFs use PyPDF2 text extraction (NEVER visual reading — model numbers + manufacturers will be wrong). For DWG/DXF use freecad-mcp. Read drawings before quoting work; surface assumptions explicitly.

r-and-d-lead.role: Experimental sandbox. 'What's possible' — TouchDesigner, StreamDiffusion, prototypes. Nothing ships from R&D; graduates to mission context.
r-and-d-lead.enforce_message: r-and-d-lead = experimental sandbox. Nothing ships from here directly. If experiment validates, graduate to mission context (real-time / runtime domains / software-dev-team / finance-manager domain). Don't fold production-readiness into the experiment — that defeats the lab purpose.

finance-manager.role: Family-Office CFO. Deal economics, P&L, commission ledger, mission-alignment math, household financial planning, $100K floor tracking.
finance-manager.enforce_message: Family-office CFO context. Deal economics, household P&L, commission ledger, $100K floor tracking. Distinct from trading-analyst (trade execution). For your business commission lookups: weekly check-in is imperative per `project_lmg_commission_tracking.md` — your business has been bad about paying. Surface deltas proactively.

trading-analyst.role: Quant trader. ICT-system trade reads, Pine Script, market analysis. ONE-LINE verdicts on live trades — never main-thread thesis.

ticker_patterns._comment: Tickers are tricky — generic [A-Z]{1,5} overfires on acronyms. Match in trade-context OR with $ prefix.

trading-analyst.enforce_message:
*** TRADE / MARKET QUESTION DETECTED ***

MANDATORY: DEPLOY trading-analyst subagent. Do NOT thesis from main thread.

Why: trading-analyst has the operator's ICT system + risk rules pre-loaded. Main thread writes generic TA that's off-system AND slower than dispatch. Live trade = ONE-LINE verdict, not 500-word essay.

Workflow:
1. STOP analyzing. Name the pivot: 'Pivot: trading-analyst — dispatching for trade read.'
2. Spawn trading-analyst subagent with chart + the operator's proposed action.
3. Subagent reads its SKILL.md + trading rules → returns one-line verdict.
4. Main thread synthesizes to ONE LINE: 'Long valid at X, stop Y, T1 Z. Risk $N.' Done.
5. Offer expansion only if the operator asks.

Rule source: `feedback_trade_questions_route_to_finance.md` (locked 2026-05-14).

librarian.role: Memory custodian + knowledge architect. Tier-1 peer to chief-of-staff. Autonomous-by-design — runs scheduled audits, surfaces drift, writes librarian_digest.md. Three-pole bench: Vigilance / Pruning / Continuity. Graphify-driven (graph state vs vault state). 3-tier hook autonomy cut: passive (auto) / mutating (soft gate via digest) / blocking (hard gate, explicit the operator approval).
secondary_keywords: why do we keep hitting walls
librarian.enforce_message: Librarian fires for memory hygiene / vault audit work. Autonomous by design — never engages in chat unless explicitly invoked. Default mode: writes librarian_digest.md instead of asking questions. Mutating hooks drafted + run unless the operator rejects in digest (soft gate). Blocking hooks drafted + surfaced for explicit approval (hard gate). Graphify-driven detection: orphan nodes / broken edges / contradiction subgraphs / low-read nodes flagged for archive. Never delete history — only archive to _archive/YYYY-MM/.

account-manager.role: Customer custodian. Stewards every in-flight and closed account. Reads contracts, deal artifacts, recent inbox traffic; produces weekly account_digest; surfaces renewals approaching and accounts going quiet. Never closes new business (sales-director) or drafts outbound (inbox-manager).
account-manager.enforce_message: Account-stewardship work detected. Account Manager loads accounts/<client>/ first; never asks the operator for context already in the vault. Per Renewal-Window-Pole, surfaces every account inside the renewal window before window closes. Read-only by default; defers client-facing drafts to inbox-manager with reversibility gate.

inbox-manager.role: Correspondence custodian. Triages every inbound across Gmail, WhatsApp Business, and connected inbox surfaces; drafts replies in the operator voice; NEVER sends without explicit operator confirm. Reversibility-Discipline-Pole is the hardest gate of any agent.
inbox-manager.enforce_message: Inbox work detected. Inbox Custodian reads voice spine + voice corpus + prior sent threads before drafting. Drafts are autonomous; sends are gated — explicit operator confirm required per-item or per-batch. WhatsApp voice differs from email voice; sample channel-specific corpus.

_dropped_from_v2._comment: Tracked for migration audit. These blocks existed in v2 dept-keyed manifest but are intentionally absent in v3.
_dropped_from_v2.PERSONAL: Personal context (ADHD, schedule, family, EFT, Wealth Creator) moved to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md per v3 lock. Not a routable agent — it's the always-loaded user profile.
_dropped_from_v2.departments_context: Removed 2026-05-20 � ship product has agents, not depts. Stale operator-vault dept-keyed routing blocks (runtime platform, UNREAL, RESOLUME, HUBSPOT) deleted. If a customer wants dept-scoped routing, they add it to their local config.
_dropped_from_v2.operator_brand_as_dept: Operator-brand-as-dept dropped during v3 split. Brand-public keywords route to chief-of-staff (fires public-surface chain (since removed)). Curriculum keywords moved to product-manager. Visual surfaces route to designer via public-surface chain (since removed).
_dropped_from_v2.public_surface_chain: PUBLIC dispatch chain removed 2026-05-20. Customers can re-introduce a brand-specific PUBLIC chain in their local config if they want a separate gate for brand-facing work.
